source_refs: Project evidence: homepage Mission section right-side cutout role
business_goal: Create a right-side mission cutout image that feels capable, grounded, and easy to isolate visually
page_role: Homepage Mission section fixed cutout image
visual_message: A single engineering subject with strong silhouette and credible industrial context
iteration_hypothesis: A subject-led industrial portrait with clean silhouette control will support the fixed mission cutout better than a wider contextual scene

technical_signals.time_of_day: neutral interior or shaded exterior light

spatial_positioning: single subject fills most of the frame height
background must stay secondary and separable
subject silhouette remains readable when clipped into a custom mask
equipment can support context without crowding the subject
color_restriction: restrained industrial neutrals with limited controlled accent colors; avoid neon and hyper-saturation
material_notes: real PPE, document, or equipment textures

composition_rule.focal_structure: one dominant subject with minimal background noise

lighting_rule.contrast: controlled and clear enough for subject separation
lighting_rule.surface_behavior: real subject textures and believable highlights
